creator: iblis.dif01@nctu.edu.tw
text:
Created attachment 183987
julia 0.6.0 patch

* changelog: https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/release-0.6/NEWS.md

* new OPTIONS: LIBM

* poudriere testport:
    * pass on amd64, 11.0-RELEASE with default OPTIONS
    * pass on amd64, 11.0-RELEASE with LIBM/SYSLIBM
    * pass on amd64, 11.0-RELEASE with LIBM/OPENLIBM
    * pass on i386, 11.0-RELEASE with default OPTIONS
    * pass on i386, 11.0-RELEASE with LIBM/SYSLIBM
    * pass on i386, 11.0-RELEASE with LIBM/OPENLIBM
